userIdea.rawPrompt: I want a simple task tracker app where I can add tasks, mark them complete, delete them, filter by all/active/completed, and see a count of remaining active tasks. It should have a clean modern UI and work in the browser.
userIdea.normalizedGoal: Simple browser task tracker with add, complete, delete, filter, and active task count
userIdea.problemStatement: User needs a lightweight way to manage daily tasks in the browser
userIdea.desiredOutcome: Working task tracker with filters and remaining active task count

requirements.description: Add new tasks from user input
acceptanceCriteria: User can type a task and add it to the list
Added task appears immediately
User can toggle task completion
Completed tasks are visually distinct
User can delete a task
Deleted task is removed from all views

requirements.description: Filter tasks by all, active, and completed
acceptanceCriteria: User can view all tasks
User can view active tasks only
User can view completed tasks only

requirements.description: Display count of remaining active tasks
acceptanceCriteria: Active task count updates when tasks change
Count reflects incomplete tasks only

requirements.description: Clean modern browser UI for task management
acceptanceCriteria: Layout is readable on desktop browser
Primary actions are obvious
Application runs in a modern web browser
Primary flows work without page reload

requirements.description: In-browser task state for session usage
acceptanceCriteria: Tasks persist while the app is open
Task list state remains consistent during filtering
